cards.front: What is the main advantage of the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: Interactive and engaging, allows for immediate feedback and questions

cards.front: What type of presentation is commonly used in conjunction with the Chalk and Talk method?
What is the primary goal of using PowerPoint Presentation in the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: To supplement and illustrate the lecture, not to replace the lecturer's explanation

cards.front: What is the main disadvantage of the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: Can be time-consuming and may not be effective for larger classes

cards.front: What is the purpose of using a PowerPoint Presentation in Linear Algebra optimization techniques?
cards.back: To visualize complex concepts and provide a clear and concise overview of the material
